ruleBookInfo.kind: {{(()=>{var b=JSON.parse(src).data.bookInfo;var ts=(b.lastSerialUpdateTime||0)*1000;var d=new Date(ts);var p=(n)=>n<10?'0'+n:''+n;var label=b.isfinish ? '已完结：' : '连载中：';return [b.subject||'',b.subtype||'',label + d.getFullYear()+'-'+p(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+p(d.getDate())].join(',');})()}}

')>-1){block=src.split('

ruleContent.content: {{(function(){var html=src;if(html.indexOf('let token = "')>-1){var token=html.split('let token = "')[1].split('"')[0];var sep=chapter.url.indexOf('?')>-1?'&':'?';html=java.ajax(chapter.url+sep+'challenge='+java.encodeURI(token));}var s=html.split('<article class="page-content">');if(s.length<2)return '';s=s[1].split('<section>');if(s.length<2)return '';s=s[1];if(s.indexOf('<div class="abg"')>-1){s=s.split('<div class="abg"')[0];}else{s=s.split('</section>')[0];}return java.htmlFormat(s).trim();})()}}
ruleContent.title: article.page-content > h3@text
